economic_notes: First Nation has 11.1% interest in MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership and 99% interest in MSFN Economic Development Company LP. Also owns 100% of Makwa Lake Development Co and MSFN Economic Development Company Ltd (GBEs). Treaty benefit and surrender claim initiated March 2020 against Canada asserting breach of Treaty 6. Claim-related expenses of $1,889,512 omitted from financial statements pending settlement.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Consolidated entity includes MSFN Operations, CMHC Housing Fund, and Store Enterprise. Four entities recorded under modified equity method (GBEs/LPs): Makwa Lake Development Co, Meadow Lake Resource Development LP, MSFN Economic Development LP, MSFN Economic Development Ltd. Treaty claim expenses of ~$1.89M omitted from financial statements and only disclosed in notes. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Ottawa Trust + Meadow Lake Tribal Council + Saskatchewan Lotteries + CMHC + Northern Lights + First Nations Trust = $24,830,279 + $34,182 + $6,213,954 + $11,935 + $1,200,898 + $99,833 + $652,763 = $33,043,844. OSR includes LP earnings, GBE earnings, interest, store sales, rent, other revenue, and recognition of unexpended funding. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
